response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, decades of hands-on development experience across multiple languages and domains, and strong open-source contributions—particularly in Linux and open-source GIS tools—but lacks demonstrated leadership in architectural oversight, team management, and client advisory roles, and his German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the required C1 level.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with open-source technologies and Linux environments
Proven track record of founding and maintaining impactful open-source projects
Strong background in testing, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship practices
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of leading teams, managing projects, or advising clients at executive level
Lacks explicit UML, architecture design documentation, or requirements management experience
